title: Nowy Sącz, Lesser Poland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nowy Sącz, Lesser Poland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nowy Sącz is a city in Lesser Poland with a population of 83,241. A historic city in the Carpathian foothills of southern Poland, known for its Gothic basilica, open-air ethnographic museum, and proximity to the Beskid Mountains.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
